Title: 2 Hearts
Writer: Robin U. Russin, Veronica Szymanski, Eric Gregory
Actors: Jacob Elordi, Adan Canto, Tiera Skovbye
Plot: For two couples the future unfolds in different decades and different places, but a hidden connection will bring them together in a way no one could have predicted. Based on an inspirational true story, 2 Hearts is a romantic journey that celebrates life, love and generosity of spirit, and challenges audiences to believe miracles are possible.
